title: Random Junk
description: A mod filled to the brim with random meme features
body:
This mod adds many different features to many different parts of the game. A lot of the features presented by the Random Junk mod are mostly for fun, and as such may be joke items or be based on memes, but many other features are unique to this mod. A few even are meant to be generalized stereotypes of certain mod types, like End mods. Some of these features include the following:

Shield potions.

Three new dimensions with their own biomes and materials.

A "substance dealer" villager and related items.

Chocolate.

Paper airplanes.

Cheese.

Corn.

Sandworms.

Aluminum.

Many new overworld biomes.

Cancer.

A jackhammer.

A magnifying glass.

Multiple new Nether biomes.

And so much more!
